data.title: Hedera Faces Potential 20% Decline Amid Weakening Market Sentiment
data.description:
Hedera (HBAR) has experienced a decline of over 10% in the past week, indicating a potential risk for further correction. According to NS3.AI, the cryptocurrency's price structure has weakened, with capital outflows and deteriorating sentiment contributing to this trend. A head-and-shoulders pattern has formed, with a neckline near $0.102, suggesting a possible additional 20% drop if this level is breached. This is further supported by a negative Chaikin Money Flow and low positive sentiment.

Despite these challenges, there is a possibility for a short-term rebound. Net outflows from exchanges and significant short positions could provide an opportunity for recovery if HBAR manages to reclaim resistance levels at $0.105 and $0.112.
